Sloppy Joe's

Mary Germick

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield: 12 servings

Ingredients

6 lb. ground beef, browned & drained 2 medium onions, chopped 1 green pepper, chopped salt & pepper, to taste 1/4 cup mustard, 1-2 cups catsup 1/8 to 1/4 cup sugar 2 doz. hamburger buns

Directions

Add all to browned beef and simmer for about 1 1/2 hours.
